primary_endpoint.name: Change from Baseline to Week 24 in ADAS-Cog (11) Score
primary_endpoint.measurement_tool: ADAS-Cog (Alzheimer's Disease Assessment Scale - Cognitive Subscale)
primary_endpoint.statistical_method: ANCOVA with treatment, pooled site group, and baseline score as covariates; LOCF for missing data

analysis_populations.name: Safety
analysis_populations.definition: All subjects who received at least one dose of study drug

analysis_populations.name: Efficacy
analysis_populations.definition: All subjects with at least one post-baseline efficacy assessment
